title: Property search returns listings outside selected radius
description: Users searching within a 5-mile radius receiving results 20+ miles away. Map pins appear far outside the drawn search area. Issue reproducible across all metro regions.

title: Mortgage calculator showing incorrect monthly payments
description: Affordability calculator returning monthly payments roughly 15% lower than expected. Users reporting numbers that don't match lender estimates. Affects all loan terms and rates.

title: Saved searches not sending new listing alerts
description: Users with saved searches not receiving email alerts when matching homes hit the market. Saved criteria stored correctly, but no notifications generated for new inventory.

title: Price filter excludes valid listings at boundary values
description: Setting a max price of $500,000 hides homes listed at exactly $500,000. Same off-by-one behavior on the minimum price boundary. Users missing relevant listings.

title: Listing photos loading in wrong order
description: Property galleries displaying photos in random order on each page load. The designated primary/hero image often appears in the middle of the carousel instead of first.

title: Map clustering freezes browser with many listings
description: Searching dense urban areas with 2000+ results causes the map to hang for 10-15 seconds and the tab to become unresponsive. CPU usage spikes to 100% while rendering pins.

title: Favorited homes disappearing from user account
description: Saved/favorited properties vanishing from users' lists after a day or two. Users re-favoriting the same homes repeatedly. No deletion action taken by the users.

title: Schedule-a-viewing requests not reaching agents
description: Buyers submitting tour requests but agents never receiving them. Confirmation shown to the buyer, but no record appears in the agent dashboard or inbox.

title: Sold and pending homes still appearing as active
description: Listings marked sold or under contract in the MLS still showing as 'For Sale' on the site. Buyers contacting agents about unavailable homes. Status lag of up to 48 hours.

title: Search results page loads extremely slowly
description: Search results taking 25+ seconds to render. DevTools show multiple slow queries joining listings, photos, and agent data. Page unresponsive while loading. Affects all search traffic.

title: Pre-approval document upload failing for large files
description: Buyers unable to upload pre-approval letters or proof-of-funds PDFs larger than 5MB. Progress bar reaches 100% then shows 'Upload failed'. Browser console shows a 413 error.

title: Commute-time filter returning impossible results
description: Filtering by 'under 30 min commute to work' returns homes 2+ hours away by car. Drive-time estimates wildly inaccurate. Feature unusable for relocation buyers.

title: Duplicate listings appearing for the same property
description: Same home showing two or three times in results with slightly different prices and photos. Caused by the property being listed across multiple MLS feeds. Confuses buyers and skews counts.

title: Offer submission deposit payment declined for international buyers
description: Overseas buyers placing earnest money deposits receiving 'Payment declined' with gateway error 402. Only affects cards issued outside the US. Domestic deposits process fine.

title: Map drawing tool loses custom search area on refresh
description: Users who draw a custom polygon to define their search area lose it whenever the page refreshes or they navigate back. Have to redraw the boundary every visit.

title: School rating data showing for wrong addresses
description: Listings displaying school district and rating info for a neighboring district. Buyers making decisions on incorrect school assignment data. Mismatch most common near district boundaries.

title: Price-drop notifications firing for unchanged listings
description: Users receiving 'Price reduced!' alerts for homes whose price never changed. Some alerts triggered multiple times per day for the same listing, eroding trust in notifications.

title: Listing detail API returning stale data after updates
description: Same listing endpoint returning different prices and statuses within seconds of each other. Appears to be a caching issue. GET /api/listings/:id sometimes serves outdated info.

title: Sort by 'newest' showing old listings first
description: Sorting search results by 'Newest' surfaces homes that have been on the market for weeks ahead of brand-new listings. Sort order appears partly reversed and inconsistent.

title: Buyer-agent chat messages delayed by several minutes
description: In-app messages between buyers and agents arriving 3-5 minutes late. WebSocket connection appears stable with no disconnections in logs. Affects time-sensitive offer negotiations.

title: Search radius filter not respected, listings shown miles away
description: When a user sets a 5-mile search radius the results include properties 15-25 miles outside the boundary. Map markers appear well beyond the highlighted search zone. Consistent across all cities tested.
